capsules.essence: Creates skills from experience, improves skills during use, nudges memory persistence, searches prior sessions, and builds long-lived user context.
capsules.asolariaFit: Map to BEHCS mistake-ledger, reverse-gain promotion, Atlas Store, and supervisor-created skill contracts.

capsules.essence: Thread-safe SQLite state with WAL, checkpoints, session lineage, child sessions, usage, memories, and startup VACUUM/prune.
capsules.asolariaFit: Use as design input for Asolaria memoryStore/taskLedgerStore/mistakeLedgerStore WAL-backed evolution.

capsules.essence: Provider-specific HTTP/API conversion moved behind transport classes: Anthropic, chat completions, Responses/Codex, Bedrock.
capsules.asolariaFit: Map into brainPolicy/workerRouter as pluggable cognitive-engine transport contracts.

capsules.essence: Plugins and shell hooks can register commands, dispatch tools, block tool calls, transform tool results, and alter terminal output.
capsules.asolariaFit: Map to GAC-governed connector hooks with fail-closed pre-tool policy and audit logging.

capsules.essence: Unified gateway for Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, Matrix, Email, SMS, Feishu, WeCom, QQBot, webhooks, and more.
capsules.asolariaFit: Crosswalk to Asolaria connectors and mobile/guardian surfaces with platform-specific session keys.

capsules.essence: Natural-language scheduled jobs with platform delivery, skills, pause/resume/run/remove flows.
capsules.asolariaFit: Map to OmniScheduler and taskLedgerStore, gated by Law001 and resource-budget guard.

capsules.essence: Filesystem checkpoints and rollback surfaces before destructive operations.
capsules.asolariaFit: Bind to C-drive pressure guard, Brown-Hilbert file identity, and pre-mutation approval snapshots.

capsules.essence: Subagents can run as orchestrators with configurable spawn depth and file coordination.
capsules.asolariaFit: Map to Omnispindle/Omniflywheel coupled workers with supervisor fanout limits.

capsules.essence: React/Ink TUI backed by Python JSON-RPC, streaming status, slash completion, picker, and subagent observability.
capsules.asolariaFit: Design input for Asolaria worker-runtime/graph-runtime frontends and terminal dashboards.

capsules.essence: Security hardening spans API auth, path traversal, sandbox writes, SSRF, webhook signature validation, OAuth lifecycle, and interrupt scoping.
capsules.asolariaFit: Map directly to GAC, riskEngine, gateway/toolAuthority, and hookwall hardening lanes.
